projects.title: ScholarLens
projects.description: An AI-powered platform designed to help users efficiently understand and extract insights from academic documents using a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) approach. It combines intelligent search with natural language generation to provide accurate answers and summaries from uploaded papers.
contributions: Researched and developed an iterative multi-hop RAG architecture incorporating LLMs and Vector Databases for complex academic document analysis
Integrated RAG capabilities into a chatbot interface by building a high-performance backend using FastAPI
Implemented data streaming through RESTful APIs to provide real-time chatbot responses for over 16 evaluation respondents
Streamlined scholarly content exploration by utilizing transformer-based models to automate key information extraction

projects.title: Sugar Counting
projects.description: Industrial automation project designed to help companies accurately count sugar sacks on a conveyor belt using computer vision. It enables real-time detection and tracking to minimize manual errors in industrial environments.
contributions: Achieved a 0.94 mAP accuracy score by developing and fine-tuning a YOLOv8-based computer vision model
Eliminated manual tracking errors by automating real-time sack counting on conveyor belts using Python and CNN architectures
Optimized detection performance for industrial hardware by fine-tuning models with OpenCV and PyTorch
Engineered an end-to-end industrial automation pipeline for real-time tracking in warehouse environments

projects.title: Smart Surveillance System
projects.description: Smart surveillance system with real-time object detection and tracking capabilities, designed and deployed for enhanced security monitoring at GYS facilities.
contributions: Implemented high-performance computer vision models for real-time object detection, tracking, and automated alerting
Integrated the system with existing CCTV infrastructure to allow for seamless deployment without requiring hardware replacement
Optimized detection algorithms for continuous 24/7 monitoring while maintaining minimal latency for critical security responses
Designed and deployed a scalable architecture capable of handling multiple video streams simultaneously for GYS facilities

projects.title: Scanocular
projects.description: AI-based mobile application for early detection of eye diseases like cataracts, glaucoma, and diabetic retinopathy using just a smartphone camera.
contributions: Built an AI model for eye disease detection by training on secondary datasets with YOLOv8
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs to facilitate seamless integration between the AI model and the mobile frontend
Developed a responsive application interface using React Native and Tailwind CSS for optimal user experience
Created smart contracts for secure medical data management within the application ecosystem

projects.title: Yayasan Harmoni Semesta Lestari
projects.description: Web-based information system developed to support administrative management and operational digitalization for an organizational foundation.
contributions: Architected a structured backend system using Express.js to ensure efficient data management and system performance
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs to support all organizational system functionalities
Managed complex database operations for storing and processing organizational data using MySQL
Implemented secure authentication and authorization mechanisms for both administrators and regular users

projects.title: Dreambooth
projects.description: Self-service photobooth platform consisting of a web-based management dashboard and a high-performance desktop kiosk application.
contributions: Successfully deployed a self-service platform to 10 commercial clients by managing end-to-end technical operations
Engineered a high-performance desktop kiosk experience using Electron.JS for seamless hardware integration
Integrated Xendit payment gateway to facilitate secure real-time QRIS transactions for daily operations
Sliced and integrated UI designs using Next.js and Tailwind CSS while building a robust MongoDB backend

projects.title: LMS BP2MI
projects.description: Learning Management System specifically tailored for Indonesian migrant workers and civil servants, serving approximately 3,000 users.
contributions: Developed core automation features for adding LMS participants from Excel files and generating digital certificates
Enhanced software reliability by implementing Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) pipelines using Jenkins
Maintained high system availability by orchestrating containerized application deployments using Docker
Optimized backend performance and database queries to handle a load of approximately 3,000 active users

projects.title: PPSMB Pionir Gadjah Mada
projects.description: Information website for new student orientation at Universitas Gadjah Mada, featuring Augmented Reality for campus tours.
contributions: Developed an information portal that successfully served approximately 70,000 users during student orientation
Built the 'LENSAGAMA' core feature using AR.JS technology to introduce the campus environment via Augmented Reality
Integrated the Next.js frontend with a Strapi CMS for dynamic and efficient content management
Achieved high scalability to handle massive traffic spikes during the peak orientation period

projects.title: Covchain
projects.description: Blockchain-based COVID-19 vaccine tracking application designed to prevent data falsification and ensure supply chain transparency.
contributions: Mitigated data falsification by developing an innovative blockchain-based Android application for secure vaccine tracking
Guaranteed immutable record-keeping by architecting a backend integrated with the VEXANIUM blockchain ecosystem
Implemented vaccine tracking features to determine precise location and delivery status of vaccine supplies
Developed secure smart contracts to manage vaccine distribution density and prevent supply chain embezzlement

projects.title: Reconchain
projects.description: Blockchain-based mobile application designed to track carbon emissions produced by specific products.
contributions: Developed a blockchain solution to reduce carbon emissions by tracking product environmental impact
Created and deployed smart contracts on the Polygon blockchain for transparent carbon credit recording
Integrated the Django-based backend with a mobile frontend to provide real-time emission tracking
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs to facilitate communication between the AI analysis and the blockchain layer

projects.title: PORSENIGAMA 2023
projects.description: A web-based platform for information and athlete registration during the Porsenigama event, designed to handle large-scale student participation and real-time competition tracking.
contributions: Managed the end-to-end development life cycle as Project Manager and Full Stack Developer for an event portal serving 6,000+ students.
Developed a centralized athlete and artist registration system that successfully processed thousands of participants.
Engineered a real-time leaderboard feature for inter-faculty competitions to enhance engagement and transparency during the event.
Integrated Next.js frontend with Strapi headless CMS to ensure efficient content updates and registration data handling.

projects.title: Herbacare
projects.description: A health-tech platform focused on herbal medicine and natural remedies, providing a comprehensive database and consultation features for traditional healthcare solutions.
contributions: Architected a scalable backend infrastructure using Express.js to manage a comprehensive database of herbal remedies and user health records.
Engineered secure RESTful APIs that facilitated seamless communication between the web frontend and the centralized health information system.
Optimized data retrieval performance for 100+ herbal medicine categories by implementing efficient indexing and query structures in MySQL.
Accomplished high system reliability by conducting rigorous API testing and implementing structured error handling across the backend services.

projects.title: GoPay: Stop Online Gambling Microsite
projects.description: A high-traffic educational microsite developed for GoPay to raise awareness about the dangers of online gambling, featuring interactive content and optimized for a seamless user experience.
contributions: Optimized web performance for a public awareness microsite by implementing code splitting and lazy loading using Nuxt.JS and Vue.JS.
Engineered a responsive and accessible user interface to ensure effective message delivery to thousands of GoPay users across various devices.
Collaborated with the creative team to translate campaign requirements into high-fidelity web components with smooth transitions and animations.
Achieved 40% faster page load times by optimizing asset delivery and leveraging server-side rendering (SSR) capabilities.
